title: Rolson 30959 All Purpose Screwdriver Bit Set
features: Set includes Slotted, Crosspoint, Hex, Star, Tri Wing, Square, Spanner, Spline and Butterfly bits
Cup hook bit and 60 mm magnetic bit holder
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring them innovative products, all at the possible margins and this year is no different. To date, they have over 250 exciting and innovative products to whet their appetite, together with a host of new in store packaging and point of sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to their existing lines. They bring product combinations that bring originality. Rolson 30959 All Purpose Screwdriver Bit Set All Purpose Bit Set Manufactured from Chrome Vanadium and including slotted 3, 4, 4.5, 5, 5.5, 6, 6.5, 7, 7 mm. The drive socket extension, cup hook bit, and 60 mm magnetic bit holder.
